---
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  results: asis
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    fig-align: center
    fontsize: 12pt
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    out.width: "100%"
editor: source
---

```{r}
params <- yaml::read_yaml(here::here("params.yaml"))
```

{{< include sub_reports/sales/sales_val.qmd >}}

{{< include sub_reports/stats/vertical-equity-for-high-and-low-value.qmd >}}

{{< include sub_reports/features/feature_qc.qmd >}}
